description_long: This is a large, teal-colored outdoor trash bin with a rectangular body and a hinged lid. The bin features two black wheels at the rear for easy mobility and has visible handles integrated into the lid. The exterior is decorated with graffiti, including a cartoon character, a heart, and various tags, as well as a recycling symbol embossed on the side. There are red paint drips and white glove-like graphics on the front edge of the lid, adding a distinctive urban character. The surface shows signs of dirt and wear, suggesting frequent use in a public or street environment.
description: A teal, wheeled outdoor trash bin with graffiti, a hinged lid, and integrated handles, showing signs of urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows red paint drips, white glove graphics, a heart, and graffiti on the body below the lid.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the recycling symbol, graffiti, and one of the black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view features a large cartoon character graffiti and both wheels visible at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view displays more graffiti, the recycling symbol, and the second wheel.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: recycling symbol, graffiti, cartoon character, heart, no official waste type label
